name: h3c-secpath
description: OctoBus package for H3C SecPath (Comware 7 RESTCONF): manage security zones, firewall policies, object groups, sessions, interfaces, ACL, and NAT via the Comware 7 REST API.

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetDeviceBase.name: get-device-base
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetDeviceBase.description: Retrieve H3C SecPath device basic information.

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetSecurityZones.name: get-security-zones
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetSecurityZones.description: List all security zones on the H3C SecPath firewall.

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetZonePairs.name: get-zone-pairs
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetZonePairs.description: List all security zone pairs (inter-zone policy bindings).

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetIPv4SecurityP.name: get-ipv4-security-policies
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetIPv4SecurityP.description: List IPv4 security policy rules (firewall rules).

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetSessions.name: get-sessions
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetSessions.description: List active network sessions on the H3C SecPath firewall.

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetInterfaces.name: get-interfaces
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetInterfaces.description: List all interfaces and their status.

H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetACLGroups.name: get-acl-groups
H3C_SECPATH.H3C_SECPATH/GetACLGroups.description: List ACL groups and their rules.
